subcodes.title: FAFINE
subcodes.first_line:
## FAFINE

Faka-lauefa a Tou igoa, O te Aliki toku Atua!  Taofi aka ne Koe toku mata e faka-moemoe ke kilo ki luga i mea
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH03361 — Opens 'Lauded be Thy name...Thou dost fix my eyes hopefully'; different prayer (for handmaidens). Correct tvl is pm_981
